## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Describe the "What" and "Why", not the "How". -->

## Type
<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] `feat` — New feature or capability
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Internal restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Tooling, deps, CI

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `develop` (`git merge develop` per §3A)
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits format (§2C)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` (§7B)
- [ ] No raw data, results, or compiled output committed (§6B)

## Changelog Entry
<!-- Paste your CHANGELOG.md addition here for reviewer visibility (§7D format) -->
* <Action> <Impact>: Brief description. ([#PR_NUMBER])

## Related Issues / PRs
<!-- e.g., Closes #12, depends on #11 -->
